title: dev_ptr_mut bypassed inside Device methods
description: In wolftpm/src/device.rs, the Device::drop, get_random, and pcr_read methods all write self.dev.as_mut() as *mut _ directly instead of calling self.dev_ptr_mut(), which exists precisely for this purpose. All callers inside Device itself should use dev_ptr_mut() for consistency and to keep the raw-pointer pattern in one place.
